pokemon:corviknight.name: Corviknight
pokemon:corviknight.summary: With their great intellect and flying skills, these Pokémon very successfully act as the Galar region’s airborne taxi service.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: With their great intellect and flying skills, these Pokémon very successfully act as the Galar region’s airborne taxi service.
This Pokémon reigns supreme in the skies of the Galar region. The black luster of its steel body could drive terror into the heart of any foe.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: With their great intellect and flying skills, these Pokémon very successfully act as the Galar region’s airborne taxi service.

pokemon:corvisquire.name: Corvisquire
pokemon:corvisquire.summary: The lessons of many harsh battles have taught it how to accurately judge an opponent’s strength.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: The lessons of many harsh battles have taught it how to accurately judge an opponent’s strength.
Smart enough to use tools in battle, these Pokémon have been seen picking up rocks and flinging them or using ropes to wrap up enemies.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: The lessons of many harsh battles have taught it how to accurately judge an opponent’s strength.

pokemon:rookidee.name: Rookidee
pokemon:rookidee.summary: Jumping nimbly about, this small-bodied Pokémon takes advantage of even the slightest opportunity to disorient larger opponents.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Jumping nimbly about, this small-bodied Pokémon takes advantage of even the slightest opportunity to disorient larger opponents.
It will bravely challenge any opponent, no matter how powerful. This Pokémon benefits from every battle—even a defeat increases its strength a bit.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Jumping nimbly about, this small-bodied Pokémon takes advantage of even the slightest opportunity to disorient larger opponents.
